title: Shiny Gen 2 Charizard - Cobblemon
description: A resource pack that restores the Charmander line's shinnies from Gen 2.
body:
# Gen 2 Charizard
![Shiny Charmander Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/000ff0d67bc2840f4e1f5b7c92bc1a6e809921db.png)
## About
A simple resource pack that replaces Cobblemon's Shiny Charmander line with textures from Pokemon Gold, Silver and Crystal.
